      • DIRECTORY of Possibility Management (PM) Websites

        • To search the StartOver.xyz univere, please use: https://nextculturenow.com/possibility-search

           
        • Ask Us Anything during our first-Sunday-of-each-month open Zoom call, please visit: askusanything.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about HOW TO PLAY StartOver.xyz, please visit: howtoplay.mystrikingly.com
        • To register for Expand The Box Training or Possibility Labs, please visit: possibilitymanagement.org
        • To register for PM related WorkTalks, Workshops, etc., please visit our Teamup Calendar: hteamup.com/ksqigc5yvcag3dordv
        • For info about Possibilitator Training, please visit: possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Possibilitators and their Projects, please visit: possibilitymanagers.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM history, roots, shoots, fruits, hoots, and books, please visit: museumofpm.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Expand The Box Training, please visit: expandthebox.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Possibility Labs, please visit: possibilitylabs.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, please visit: initiations.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Archiarchy, please visit: archiarchy.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Torus Meeting Technology, please visit: torustechnology.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM Distinctions, please visit: distinctionary.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM Thoughtmaps, please visit: pmthoughtmaps.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM Processes, please visit: pmprocesses.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM Podcasts, please visit: nextcultureradio.org
        • For PM Videos, please visit: youtube.com/PossibilityManagementTV
        • For PM recommended Books, please visit: possibilitybooks.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM recommended Films, please visit: possibilityfilms.mystrikingly.com
        • For S.P.A.R.K.s (Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge), please visit: sparks-english.mystrikingly.com
        • For S.T.A.R.R.s (Startling Tales About Radical Responsibility), please visit: starrs.mystrikingly.com
        • For PM Articles, please visit: jewelsofpossibility.mystrikingly.com
        • To view over 100 sample Emotional Healing Process (EHP) videos with Possibility Coaching, please visit: createpossibility.mystrikingly.com
        • To join the EHP Collaboration Telegram Group, please use this link: http://t.me/joinchat/WC5Px3vhJLpGU-Cz
        • To join the PM Events Telegram Group, please use this link: https://t.me/+z6dG4whLcaAwZGM6
        • To join the Possibility Creation Village Telegram Group, please use this link: https://t.me/+ViEuN7pEHlcSDlCv
        • For info about Bridge-House, please visit: bridge-house.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Rage Club, please visit: rageclub.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about Fear Club, please visit: fearclub.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about becoming a Feelings Practitioner, please visit: feelingspractitioner.com
        • For info about becoming a Possibility Coach, please visit: possibilitycoachingtraining.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about becoming a Possibility Mediator, please visit: possibilitymediationtraining.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about becoming an Expand The Box Trainer, please visit: practiceexpandthebox.mystrikingly.com
        • To register your StartOverxyz.mystrikingly.com Matrix Points in your free account, please visit: https://login.startover.xyz
        • For info about the Possibility Management gameworld, please visit: possibilitymanagement.mystrikingly.com
        • For info about PM Trainers, please visit pmtrainers.mystrikingly.com

        SPACEPORT

        A 'spaceport' is a site capable of launching spacecraft into interplanetary trajectories, the same way a seaport is for launching boats, and an airport is for launching aircraft.
         
        This 'spaceport' is for launching YOU!
         
        Think of it as a 'YouPort'... a platform for launching you into your next steps along your (r)evolutionary Path.
         
        We hope you do what matters most, and have as much Fun as you can!
         
        As consciousness-explorer Joseph Chilton Pearce says, “Perhaps the scope of this work sounds a bit broad for a single volume, and I can hear complaints that I attempt too much. But I argue that all too often we attempt too little. Better an impossible task of splendid proportion than a sure but piddling one of no consequence. We learn from failures as well as successes.”
         
        As Lee Lozowick would say, “If it is not impossible, why bother doing it?”
        NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SPACEPOR.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      • #'s

        StartOver.xyz websites that begin with numbers.

        1 True Thing

        1truething.mystrikingly.com

         

         

         

        2 Dramas

        2dramas.mystrikingly.com

        There is a difference between drama and life. Imagine not knowing the difference. It could be a lot of energy spent trying to avoid responsibility, which, in a responsible universe like this one, may be energy used in a fool's agenda.

        (one of the PM Processes)

        2 Rapid Learnings

        2rapidlearnings.mystrikingly.com

        1. Pressure Learning:

        gobeepshiftgo.mystrikingly.com

        2. Vacuum Learning:

        vacuumlearning.mystrikingly.com

        3-3-3.mystrikingly.com

        rageclub.mystrikingly.com

        3 Games

        3games.mystrikingly.com

        Games have a context and a purpose. If you try to play a game in a different context, the rules of engagement change. If you invite a tennis player to a football game you end up with a net across the field. Knowing which game you are invited to and which game you want to play can make all the difference in the world.

        (one of the PM Thoughtmaps)

        3 Phase Healing

        3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com

        3 PHASE Healing removes you from the illness rather than trying to remove the illness from you.

        Also see:

        Dark Matter Therapy

        Integrity Healing

        Worthing Healers

        3 Powers

        3powers.mystrikingly.com

        School could have been about unfolding your potential so you could deliver your services to the Village. But school is NOT about that. Your 3 Powers go unnoticed and untrained in school, absentmindedly suppressed. Nonetheless: "What you came here to find is what you came here to build." You need these 3 Powers to change the world... which means turning on and skilling up!

        1. Declaring: declaring.mystrikingly.com
        2. Choosing: choosing.mystrikingly.com
        3. Asking: asking.mystrikingly.com

        (one of the PM Processes)

        3 Worlds

        3worlds.mystrikingly.com

        You were taught an unquestionable Thoughtmap of Worlds along with a religion that includes constructs like good and bad, heaven and hell, us and them. What if you are using very outdated thoughtware, long past its 'best if used by:___' date? What sort of thoughtware upgrade could serve you as an edgeworker, building bridges to next culture?

        (one of the PM Thoughtmaps)

        122 Methoden, um gewöhnliche Beziehungen zu erstellen

        122methoden.mystrikingly.com

        Es gibt gewöhnliche Bereiche der Liebe, außergewöhnliche Bereiche der Liebe und archetypische Bereiche der Liebe. Sie wurden entwickelt, um durch alle 3 Domänen der Liebe zu navigieren.

        Dies ist ein Auszug aus Clinton Callahans Buch Wahre Liebe im Alltage, herausgegeben von Next Culture Press.

        122 Ways To Create Ordinary Love

        122ways.mystrikingly.com

        There are ordinary domains of love, extraordinary domains of love, and archetypal domains of Love. You are designed to navigate all 3 Domains Of Love.

        This is an excerpt from Clinton Callahan's book Building Love That Lasts published by Hohm Press.

        Archiarchy

        archiarchy.mystrikingly.com

        Archiarchy is the regenerative local-authority initiation-centered culture that is naturally emerging around the world now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

        Also see:

        patriarchy.mystrikingly.com

        gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com

        culturetoculture.mystrikingly.com

        experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

        gaiavillage.mystrikingly.com

        Experience Archiarchy

        experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

        There are guide books for countries and cities, but none yet for Archiarchy. This is the first. There will also be an Archiarchy Phrase Book to help you learn the language!
        Some Archans who are currently nomadic, will be visiting Archiarchan-type projects and researching possible entries for the guide book. Let us know if you are one!

        Archiarchy Maker Fair 2023

        archiarchymakerfair.mystrikingly.com

        It is time!
        Phase 1 of Archiarchy is already completed. Archiarchy exists in the world.

        Now it is time for Phase 2 of Archiarchy: building and inhabiting Archiarchal Gameworlds.

        Are you an Archiarchy Maker? See you this Summer in Poland at the fair!

        (one of the PM Processes)

        Ask Us Anything

        askusanything.mystrikingly.com

        A couple Possibilitators are doing an Experiment: The first Sunday of each month starting December 2022 (from 2pm-3pm in the GMT+1 time zone) we open a one-hour Space on Zoom where you can Ask Us Anything... that has anything to do with Possibility Management. Or who knows where we will go with this? Same Zoom Link each month: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85773639357. Please be aware that we might also you questions. It is only fair... We are researchers. We don't know all the answers. In fact, we don't even think it's so valuable to know answers. We find it far more interesting to discover more amazing questions...

        StartOver.xyz websites that begin with 'B'.

        Bag Of Things

        bagofthings.mystrikingly.com

        (one of your 13 Tools)

        Baggage

        baggage.mystrikingly.com

        (one of the PM Processes)

        You may be burdened by carrying around extra Baggage with you, such as:

        • Abandoning your Integrity

        • Addicted

        • Adult Egostate Contaminated by Child, Parent, Gremlin or Demon
        • Assumptions
        • Being Adaptive
        • Being Unbubbled
        • Being Uncentered
        • Being Ungrounded
        • Being Uninitiated
        • Beliefs
        • Boundaries weak or lacking
        • Brain Drugs
        • Brain Splits
        • Broken Bullshit Detector
        • Child Level Responsibility
        • Complexity
        • Conclusions
        • Confusion
        • Contaminated Adult Egostate
        • Cross-Wired Memes
        • Disrespecting Your Own Word
        • Dramaholic
        • Energetic Blocks
        • Expanded NOW into the past and the future
        • Expectations
        • Fantasy Worlds
        • Fear Of Connection
        • Gremlin addictions
        • Gremlin Self Cannibalism
        • Gremlin Violence
        • Guilt
        • Handsome Holy Tribal Man (or Woman)
        • Having a Job
        • Having No Boundaries
        • Having No Sword Of Clarity
        • Having No Voice
        • Hidden Competing Commitments
        • Hookability
        • I Am Wrong
        • Ignorance of Consequences
        • Illusions or Delusions
        • Insanity
        • Judgements
        • Justifications
        • Knowing - thinking you must know
        • Lack of Integrity
        • Listening To Voices In Your Head
        • Low Dramas
        • Lying
        • Manipulation
        • Material Values
        • Materialism
        • Memetic Prisons
        • Mind Machines
        • Misidentifications
        • Mixed Emotions
        • Not being committed
        • Not being Healed From School
        • Not decided to be born yet
        • Not going through the Eye Of The Needle
        • Not having Holdings
        • Not Noticing What you are Noticing With
        • Not using your 3 Powers
        • Patriarchal Values
        • Point Of Origin anchored into Ordinary
        • Poop swept under the carpet
        • Positionality
        • Prejudices
        • Projections
        • Radical Dishonesty
        • Reactivity
        • Really Difficult Problems
        • Really Good Reasons
        • Resentment
        • Revenge in your mind and heart
        • Self Deception
        • Shame
        • Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.)
        • Starving for Heart Food or Soul Food
        • Stories
        • Survival Strategy
        • Taking No Stand
        • Thinking you are your Box
        • Unable to Say What You Want
        • Unconscious Decisions from childhood and past lives
        • Unstellated Feelings
        • Untransformed Gremlin

        If you are carrying around ANY of this extra Baggage, your Adulthood Initiatory Path will definitely include facing the choice of not carrying so much Baggage around with you anymore.

        What about carrying around no baggage?

        Wouldn't that be remarkable?

        Radical Simplicity is amazing.

        Become An Elder

        becomeanelder.mystrikingly.com

        Adults are made by other Adults through Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes. But Elders are not made by other Elders.

        Elders are made by Adolescents who trust them enough to come to them and ask for help to get prepared for their Adulthood Initiations.

        Building Love That Lasts

        buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

        Based on the Hohm Press book: Building Love That Lasts from Clinton Callahan.

        Includes 70 Next Culture Radio Podcasts from the Radiant Joy Brilliant Love / Building Love That Lasts year-long Study Group with the author!

        The weekly online Building Love That Lasts Study Group is reopening on Mondays starting 19 September 2022 from 18:30 to 20:30 Central European Time, beginning at page 200 in the book.

        To join, please contact Eva Daubert at:  mailforeva at web dot de

        Decontaminations

        decontaminations.mystrikingly.com

        NOTE: We have discovered the long hard slow way that Decontaminating the Child Egostate, Parent Egostate, Gremlin Egostate, and Demon Egostate out of the Adult Egostate depends on first succeeding with Gremlin Transformation and recovering from Dramaholism. Successfully accomplishing Gremlin Transformation is a prerequisite for beginning Decontaminations.

        Experience Archiarchy

        experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

        There are guide books to countries and cities, but none yet to Archiarchy. This is the first. There will also be an Archiarchy Phrase Book to help you learn the language!
        Some Archans who are currently nomadic will be visiting Archiarchan-type projects and researching possible entries for the guide book. Let us know if you are one!

        Guardianship

        guardianship.mystrinkigly.com

        Being a Guardian is one of the 4 Archetypal Lineage categories needed for a gameworld to thrive. Guardianship is taking Radically Responsible care of something for the simple reason that you want it to exist, not for any reward, privilege, appreciation, or an exchange of money.

        PM Adventskalender 2009 and 2010

        pmadventskalender.mystrikingly.com

        A mostly German website...

        In both 2009 and 2010, a Team of courageous and wildly creative Possibilitators created 24 magical doorways to be seen once a day from 1. - 24. December as an Advent Calendar. These films are mostly spoken in German.

        PM Solstice Calendar 2022

        pmsolsticecalendar.mystrikingly.com

        Have you heard of an 'Advent Calendar' counting down from 1 December to 'Christmas Eve'? What an exciting thing, eh? A little free surprise gift to brighten each day! Our Bridge-House just invented a Gaian evolution of this tradition, counting down from 1 December to the Solstice - the longest AND shortest day of the year, depending on which hemisphere you are in! Welcome to the first-ever Archiarchal Advent'ure Solstice Calendar!

        Also see:
        gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com

        Possibilica

        possibilica.mystrikingly.com

        Possibilica is a nomadic Archiarchal Gaian Gameworld Nanonation delivering transformational trainings, evolutionary processes, and authentic adulthood and archetypal initiations to ecovillages, groups, and individuals through the tools, thoughtmaps, and processes of Possibility Management. We have our own flag, our own Constitution, and are writing our own Codex to set the context and rules of engagement of our Torus Technology gameworld.

        Also see:

        archiarchy.mystrikingly.com

        gameworldtheory.mystrikingly.com

        nanonations.mystrikingly.com

        possibilitymanagement.org/doingit/plabs

        Possibility Management - Home

        possibilitymanagement.org

        This is the home base for the Possibility Management gameworld. It tells you what Possibility Management is, how to learn it in trainings such as Expand The Box and Possibility Labs, how to practice it in Possibility Teams and Possibility Coaching, and how to learn to serve as a Possibility Management Trainer. It also provides a calendar of events and a list of Possibility Management trainers.

        Possibility Management - Info

        possibilitymanagement.mystrikingly.com

        What is Possibility Management itself?

        How is it possible to manage Possibility?

        bookshop.org/shop/possibilitymanagement

        If you arrange to buy your books through our Bookshop any money we receive will go to further developing StartOver.xyz.

        Quit School

        http://quitschool.mystrikingly.com

        Yes, you can Quit School.

        Even if you are 50 years old, you can get out of the conforming, adaptive, self-disempowering survival habits that you adopted while you were a student in school.

        Do you think it is about time?

        Also see:

        robert wolff

        author of the inspiring and highly recommended book: Original Wisdom
        MATRIX CODE: BOOK0142.00

        wildwolff.mystrikingly.com

        When researcher and author robert wolff died in 2015 there was no one who took over maintaining his generous website where he offered all his writings and musings, always downloadable for free. The realization that all robert's gifts might suddenly vanish from the world was a shock to me, so I stepped up and built up a replacement website using the same URL he chose: wildwolff. If you have saved something of his that you think should go there, please send it to me and I will upload it. Thank you! Meanwhile, happy reading!

        - Clinton Callahan

        Also see:

        possibilitybooks.mystrikingly.com

        SpacePort

        spaceport.mystrikingly.com

        You are NOW at the Spaceport.

        This is the catalog of what you might want to explore in the StartOver.xyz gameworld.

        Think of this as a 'YouPort', a portal for transporting you to your next step along your Path.

        Also see:

        howtoplay.mystrikingly.com

        startoverxyz.mystrikingly.com

        pmwebsite-translators.mystrikingly.com

        Spaceport-de (deutsch)

        Spaceport website in German

        spaceport-de.mystrikingly.com

        Spaceport-pl (Polski)

        Spaceport website in Polish

        spaceport-pl.mystrikingly.com

        SPARK Experiments (English)

        sparks-english.mystrikingly.com

        S.P.A.R.K. stands for 'Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge'. Reading a S.P.A.R.K. earns you 1 Matrix Point in the StartOver.xyz game. Doing any of the S.P.A.R.K. Experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Doing S.P.A.R.K. Experiments upgrades your thoughtware. Upgrading your thoughtware changes the morphogenetic field of the human race, which may be the most powerful force (outside of global warming...) changing the status quo.

        S.P.A.R.K.s are available in a growing number of languages.

        You can help.

        Also see:

        possibilitatorresources.mystrikingly.com

        distinctionary.mystrikingly.com

        starrs.mystrikingly.com

        jewelsofpossibility.mystrikingly.com

        S.P.A.R.K. Translators

        sparktranslators.mystrikingly.com

        Here is the Multilanguage Possibility Management Dictionary, contact info for the courageous Team of S.P.A.R.K. Translators, and a step-by-step procedure for getting your translated S.P.A.R.K.s online.

        Your Teams

        yourteams.mystrikingly.com

        Your Teams are, for example, your Study Group, S.P.A.R.K. Experiment Circle, Research Team, Possibility Team, Whole Permaculture Team, Rage Club, Fear Club, 3 Cell, Safe Circle, Riftwalker Team, Edgeworker Team, Growness Team, Trainer Path Team, Whole Permaculture Team, New Refugees Circle, Village Seeds Circle, Earth Guardians Circle, Village Weavers Circle, Evolutionaries Circle, Gameworld Builders Circle, Possibility Coaching Circle, Possibility Mediators Circle, Possibility Psychologists Circle, Memetic Engineers Circle, Mage Training Circle, Practice Team, etc.

        Zombies

        zombies.mystrikingly.com

        You support the Values of any Gameworld in which you participate.

        We define a 'Zombie' as 'anyone who is not aware of the Values of the Gameworlds in which they participate'.

        SPARK232 says: Thinking there is a plan for what to do next makes you a Zombie.

        Also see:

        whatnow.mystrikingly.com

        values.mystrikingly.com

        guardianship.mystrikingly.com

        youandyourjob.mystrikingly.com

        thehierarchy.mystrikingly.com

        psychopath.mystrikingly.com

        swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com

        setcontext.mystrikingly.com

        culturetoculture.mystrikingly.com

        healfromschool.mystrikingly.com

        authority.mystrikingly.com Zombieism is cured through a person taking back radical personal Authority.

         

        "Every person we save is one less Zombie we have to fight." (...from the film World War Z.)
